heading: The $ref Resolution System
body: The `$ref` resolution system is inspired by JSON Schema references. It lets you split a single monolithic JSON file into many small, focused files. The root file `index.json` maps section slugs to file references like `{"$ref": "sections/getting-started.json"}`. At seed time, the `resolve_ref` function walks the entire JSON tree recursively. When it encounters a `$ref` key, it loads the referenced file, resolves any nested `$ref` pointers within it, and replaces the reference object with the resolved content.
